channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Debugging the Google Maps Duplicate Loading Bug in React
item.description: Originally published on clintech.me If you've integrated Google Maps into a React app and seen Autocomplete randomly stop working, Directions silently fail, or the API throw google is not defined...

item.title: How to Format SQL Queries in Python: Best Practices, Gotchas, and Real-World Examples
item.description: Stop writing SQL strings that look like a ransom note. Here's how to write queries that are readable, safe, and maintainable. The Problem With "Good Enough" SQL Formatting Most Python developers...

item.title: Developer Tools That Actually Save You Time in 2026
item.description: As developers, we often lose hours to repetitive tasks - formatting data, debugging auth tokens, or wrestling with encoding issues. The right set of utility tools can cut that overhead...

item.title: I Built a Freelance Job Hunting Automation on n8n — Here's Everything I Learned
item.description: I'm a 17-year-old IT student from Luxembourg. A few months ago I got tired of spending 2-3 hours a day manually browsing Upwork, Malt, and Freelancer looking for projects. So I built an automation...

item.title: How to add a contact form to your static site — no backend, no monthly fee
item.description: I got tired of paying for form services or spinning up a backend just to handle contact form submissions. So I built RG Forms — a contact form endpoint backed entirely by a Google Sheet you own....

item.title: SAFEDEPLOY AI: DevOps Pipeline Intelligence System
item.description: Problem Statement: DevOps Pipeline Agent: Modern software delivery pipelines generate large amounts of operational data. Understanding the relationship between deployments, infrastructure changes,...

item.title: Building a Multi-Agent AI Movie Production Team with Google ADK
item.description: 🚀 What I Built I created a collaborative AI Multi-Agent system using Google's new Agent Development Kit (ADK). The system functions as an automated Hollywood Production Team designed to streamline...

item.title: Copilot Chat Goes GA in PRs — But Multi-Repo Visibility Is Still Missing
item.description: GitHub moved Copilot Chat's richer pull request experience to general availability this week — side-by-side chat with diffs, inline editing, and context-aware answers without leaving the review...

item.title: Your Agent Returns 200 and Lies. Verify Before You Trust
item.description: A success gate verifies an AI agent's claimed success before your system accepts it. SuccessGate runs three read-only checks — schema/contract, claim-vs-evidence against the actual tool-call...

item.title: Stop sharing .env files in Discord. I built a zero-setup, E2E encrypted CLI instead.
item.description: Sharing environment variables during a quick project hand-off shouldn't require setting up a heavy enterprise vault like Doppler or Infisical. But it also shouldn't mean copy-pasting plaintext API...

item.title: Microsoft, like, totally gets why students are booing AI-pilled graduation speakers
item.description: New college graduates around the country have been booing and heckling commencement speakers who hype up AI. Microsoft would like everyone to talk it out. In a blog post running more than 3,100...

item.title: The future of AI regulation is courting the strangest, most anxious bedfellows
item.description: Hello and welcome to Regulator, a newsletter for Verge subscribers about tech politics, tech influence, and tech shenanigans in Washington, DC. (If you're not a subscriber, you can get on board...

item.title: Google won’t just admit it’s feeding YouTube creators to its music AI
item.description: If you've uploaded a song to YouTube, Google almost certainly considers your video fair game for training its Lyria music AI, it just won't admit it right now. A group of independent musicians is...

item.title: ‘AI-pilled’ firms spend $7,500 per employee each month on AI
item.description: The most AI-obsessed firms are spending roughly $7,500 monthly per employee on AI, per Ramp AI Index. That's not more than an engineer's salary — yet.

item.title: You can just tell the Instagram algorithm what you want now
item.description: Instagram is going to let you tweak what its algorithm shows you on your main feed. With the Your Algorithm feature, "you can now see the topics we think you're interested in, and change them,...

item.title: Amazon’s Echo speakers can now help kids wind down and fall asleep
item.description: Amazon has launched a new feature for its Echo and Echo Kids smart speakers called Sleep Studio that's designed to make the daily transition to bedtime more enticing for kids and less stressful...

item.title: Microsoft restricts Claude Fable for employees over data retention concerns
item.description: Anthropic released Claude Fable, its first Mythos-class AI model, yesterday and it's already causing concerns inside Microsoft. Sources tell me that Microsoft is limiting the use of Claude Fable 5...

item.title: Google will save your Lens photos, Search Live recordings, and Translate audio for AI training
item.description: Google is making some changes to how it saves your interactions with Search. In an email sent to users, Google says it will save the images, files, audio, and video you use to search under a new...

item.title: How memory tools can make AI models worse
item.description: New research suggests that AI memory systems can degrade model performance and encourage sycophantic tendencies.

item.title: China-Linked JDY Botnet Expands to 1,500+ Devices for Cyber Reconnaissance
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have warned of a "resurgence and expansion" of JDY, a covert network associated with China-nexus state-sponsored threat actors. "The JDY botnet comprises over 1,500 SOHO...

item.title: Cybersecurity researchers aren’t happy about the guardrails on Anthropic’s Fable
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers are complaining that Anthropic's new model Fable has guardrails that are too strict for any cybersecurity work.

item.title: Ivanti, Fortinet, and SAP Release Patches for Multiple Critical Vulnerabilities
item.description: Fortinet, Ivanti, and SAP have released security updates to address multiple critical security vulnerabilities that could result in arbitrary code execution and information disclosure. The...

item.title: Unpatched Langflow Flaw CVE-2026-5027 Exploited for Unauthenticated RCE
item.description: A high-severity unpatched security flaw in Langflow, an open-source low-code platform to build artificial intelligence (AI) applications, has come under active exploitation in the wild, according...

item.title: Datadog veterans launch AI coding startup Niteshift on a bet against Big AI lock-in
item.description: AI coding agent startup Niteshift has raised a $7 million seed round from a who's who of angels. It's betting companies will want power over, not lock-in with model makers.

item.title: Boox’s quirky page-turning remote won me over
item.description: Following the launch of the surprisingly popular Kobo Remote, Boox has released its own device to ease the burden of reaching for an e-reader’s touchscreen that’s an arm’s length away. The Tappy...

item.title: The Apple Watch Series 11 is back to its best price
item.description: Apple’s upcoming watchOS 27 update will bring Siri AI and other exciting features to the Apple Watch Series 9 and newer Apple Watch models. If you’re contemplating an upgrade, all colorways of the...

item.title: The three hard-tech moonshots fueling SpaceX’s unbelievable IPO
item.description: Most of the value in SpaceX's IPO is effectively a call option on the company's ambitious space data center plans.

item.title: CISA Adds Cisco, Chrome, and Arista Flaws to KEV Catalog Amid Active Exploitation
item.description: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) on Tuesday added three new vulnerabilities to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) catalog, following reports of active...

item.title: Warner Music acquires AI attribution startup Sureel AI
item.description: Through the acquisition, WMG aims to better track when its artists' work is used in AI-generated content or for training AI models.

item.title: Valve is phasing out physical Steam gift cards due to scammers
item.description: After over a decade, Steam will no longer sell physical gift cards in stores. In a support page spotted earlier by Windows Central, Valve says it will no longer restock its gift cards once they...
